mapper.sql: comments_code AS commentsCode, comments_name AS commentsName, parent_code AS parentCode, parent_codes AS parentCodes, tree_sort AS treeSort, tree_sorts AS treeSorts, tree_leaf AS treeLeaf, tree_level AS treeLevel, tree_names AS treeNames, user_id AS userId, user_b_id AS userBId, content, state, service_score AS serviceScore, efficiensy_score AS efficiensyScore, lable, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{user_b_id} AND parent_code = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2>=4 AND parent_code = 0 and user_b_id = #{user_b_id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE tree_leaf = 1 AND user_b_id = #{user_b_id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE tree_leaf = 0 AND parent_code = 0 AND (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2<4 AND user_b_id = #{user_b_id}

SELECT SUM(if(((efficiensy_score+service_score)/2>=4 AND parent_code = 0 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS highPraiseCount, SUM(if(((efficiensy_score+service_score)/2<4 AND parent_code = 0 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS badReviewCount, SUM(if((tree_leaf = 1 AND parent_code = 0 AND user_b_id = #{userBId}),1,0)) AS noResponse, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0),1,0)) AS allComments, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%1%'),1,0)) AS goodTcchnology, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%2%'),1,0)) AS fastSpeed, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%3%'),1,0)) AS repeatCustomers, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%4%'),1,0)) AS serviceEnthusiasm FROM app_merchants_comments_tree

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2>=4 AND parent_code = 0 AND user_b_id = #{userBId} ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE (efficiensy_score+service_score)/2<4 AND parent_code = 0 AND user_b_id = #{userBId} ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE tree_leaf = 1 AND parent_code = 0 AND user_b_id = #{userBId} ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0
AND (type = #{type} or type = 18)
AND type = #{type}
ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%1%' ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%2%' ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%3%' ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20

SELECT comments_code commentsCode,user_id userId,create_date time,(service_score + efficiensy_score)/2 socre,content,traffic FROM app_merchants_comments_tree WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND parent_code = 0 AND lable LIKE '%4%' ORDER by create_date DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
